desc_clean: Hellhorned X The Boneshaker is of my own design.
mechanic_summary: Vent to Spell klanu Hellhorned. Hellhorned X The Boneshaker is of my own design. Keywords: brak.
wiki_desc: Hellhorned X The Boneshaker is of my own design. Fueled by the last shards of the Pyre, the train is robust and dependable. One of its lesser-known features is the ability to unleash pressurized steam on invaders.
